anglophone.title: Trump says new talks with Iran will happen soon. And, Eric Swalwell faces new allegations
anglophone.excerpt: President Trump says new talks with Iran could happen in the next two days. And, Democrat Eric Swalwell faces new allegations as a second woman comes forward accusing him of rape.

anglophone.title: Trump says peace talks could resume in days as U.S. military blocks Iranian ports
anglophone.excerpt: President Trump said a second round of direct U.S.-Iran peace talks could resume in Pakistan within the next two days, even as he instituted a naval blockade of all Iranian ports.

anglophone.title: Magyar calls for fast handover of power in talks with Hungary's president
anglophone.excerpt: Péter Magyar, the man who ended Viktor Orbán's 16 years of continuous rule, wants the new parliament to convene in early May.

anglophone.title: Trump warns that UK trade deal 'can always be changed'
anglophone.excerpt: The US president says he gave the UK a "better" deal than he had to in an interview on Wednesday.

anglophone.title: South Africa names apartheid-era politician as new ambassador to the US
anglophone.excerpt: Roelf Meyer played a key role as a negotiator during talks to end white-minority rule in South Africa.

anglophone.title: Fela Kuti is the first African artist to enter the Rock & Roll Hall of Fame
anglophone.excerpt: In December, the late Nigerian superstar became the first African musician to get a Grammy lifetime achievement award. Now he's making history as well at Rock & Roll Hall of Fame.

anglophone.title: More than 200 Iranian sailors stranded after US torpedo attack return home
anglophone.excerpt: The survivors of the US attack on Iranian vessel Iris Dena, which claimed the lives of 104 people, were among those repatriated.

anglophone.title: Tax season was supposed to bring big refunds. So far they're less than expected
anglophone.excerpt: The average refund so far is $350 more than last year at this time, despite projections that it would be closer to $1,000 due to Republican-led tax changes as part of the Big Beautiful Bill Act.

anglophone.title: Pope heads to Cameroon as separatists announce 3-day pause in fighting
anglophone.excerpt: Pope Leo XIV is heading to the central African nation of Cameroon with a message of peace for its separatist region and for talks with President Paul Biya.

anglophone.title: No one likes being discombobulated. How did the feeling get such a fun name?
anglophone.excerpt: Sometimes you just need to recombobulate. That word isn't in the dictionary, but it is on a beloved sign at Milwaukee's airport.

anglophone.title: They counted on a rural dialysis unit to keep them alive. Then it closed
anglophone.excerpt: A hospital in Nebraska shut down the only dialysis unit for miles, upending lives. That's despite a new federal program that gave the state more than $200 million to improve rural health care access.

anglophone.title: 'No peace': Nearly a year after her son's death, she learned that ICE was responsible
anglophone.excerpt: Ruben Ray Martinez is considered the first person to be killed by ICE during President Trump's second term. His mother believes his death could have been avoided.
